since_last: 36% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.56%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -5.38% · Gold -3.09% · Nasdaq100 -0.67%. 36% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.56%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.56%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -6.95%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +4.23%, ZBRA +3.73%, INTU +3.56%, WDAY +3.51%, PUBM +3.48%. Laggards: SMR -6.95%, OKLO -6.31%, OKLO -6.31%, INOD -5.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.26% at $155.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
